caption: A man wearing a traditional purple cap and matching purple garment, along with eyeglasses, is captured in a medium shot while speaking into a silver microphone. He is positioned against a blurred background featuring a red curtain on the left and light-colored vertical panels on the right. Across all frames, the scene remains static with only slight variations in the man's facial expression and lip movement as he speaks. The video contains several graphic overlays: the "plustv" logo appears in the top left of each frame, and a purple bar reads "PLUS POLITICS." A prominent white banner displays the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Additional text at the bottom includes "SUBSCRIBE", "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA", and "LIFESTYLE". The final frames add social media icons and the text "FOLLOW US", "PLUSTVAFRICA", "WATCH ON", "DStv CH 408", and "StarTimes CH 308".
